name: @gracon/database
description: Canonical Prisma schema, migrations, and generated database client for Gracon API services

scripts.check: tsx scripts/assert-generated-client.ts && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.scripts.json --noEmit
scripts.migrate:dev: tsx scripts/assert-migration-env.ts migrate:dev && prisma migrate dev
scripts.migrate:deploy: tsx scripts/assert-migration-env.ts migrate:deploy && prisma migrate deploy
scripts.migrate:status: tsx scripts/assert-migration-env.ts migrate:status && prisma migrate status
scripts.db:seed: tsx scripts/assert-migration-env.ts db:seed && prisma db seed
